title: ternstroemia subserrata
intro: Ternstroemia subserrata, also known as the wild ginger or Japanese wild ginger, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ternstroemiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ternstroemia subserrata include relief from nausea and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide various health benefits.
